# `istream_get_gbuffer()` {#sec-istream_get_gbuffer}

Retrieves the internal [`gbuffer_t *`](#sec-gbuffer_t) associated with the given [`istream_h *`](#sec-istream_h).


::: {.panel-tabset}
## C


**Prototype**

```C
gbuffer_t *istream_get_gbuffer(
    istream_h istream
);
```

**Parameters**

| Key | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `istream` | `istream_h` | Handle to the [`istream_h *`](#istream_h) instance. |

---

**Return Value**

Returns a pointer to the [`gbuffer_t *`](#sec-gbuffer_t) associated with the given [`istream_h *`](#sec-istream_h).

**Notes**

The returned [`gbuffer_t *`](#sec-gbuffer_t) is not owned by the caller and should not be freed directly.


## JS


**Prototype**

````JS
// Not applicable in JS
````


## Python


**Prototype**

````Python
# Not applicable in Python
````


:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Examples"}

::: {.panel-tabset}
## C


````C
// TODO C examples
````


## JS


````JS
// TODO JS examples
````


## Python


````python
# TODO Python examples
````


:::

:::
